Create file governance/validators/validate_telegram_mapping.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path


def validate(schema_path="governance/telegram/telegram_input_envelope_schema.json", mapping_path="governance/telegram/telegram_to_managed_channel_mapping.json"):
    schema = json.loads(Path(schema_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    mapping = json.loads(Path(mapping_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    errors = []
    for field in ["message_id", "received_at_utc3", "operator_id_hash", "text", "target_object"]:
        if field not in schema.get("required_fields", []):
            errors.append(f"missing telegram required field {field}")
    defaults = mapping.get("defaults", {})
    if defaults.get("target_object"):
        errors.append("target_object must come from envelope or schema default, not mapping default")
    proof = defaults.get("proof_policy", {})
    if proof.get("claims_release_proof") is not False:
        errors.append("telegram mapping must not claim release proof")
    return errors

if __name__ == "__main__":
    errs = validate()
    if errs:
        print("FAIL")
        for err in errs:
            print(err)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print("PASS telegram_mapping")
